titleStmt.title: SII 26.280: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 280. (A.R. No. 265 of 1909.) TIRUKKACHCHŪR, CHINGLEPUT TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: West wall of the same shrine.

This inscription contains the praśasti of the king commencing with Pūmēvuvaḷar and mentions his queen Bhuvanamuḻuduḍaiyāḷ. It records the gift of a nandā lamp to the temple of the god Tiruvālakkōyiluḍaiyār of the village occurring in No. 279 above, by an individual named Kirandai Śelvan Sūriyadēvaṉ of the same place. It is stated that to provide for the gift, he sold a piece of land for a sum of 5 anṟāḍu-naṟkāśu to the ūr of the place.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmevuvaḷar tiruppona mārvu puṇara nā
mevukalaimakaḷ nalamperitu ciṟappa vijaiya māmakaḷ vel
puyattiruppa Icaiyiṉ celvi Eṇṭicai viḷaṅka niruparvan=tiṟai
ñca niṇilamaṭantaiyait tirumaṇam puṇarn=ta cirvaḷartarum Aṇi
muṭi kavittanamaṇi muṭicūṭimallai ñālattuppalluyirkke
llāmellaiyivinpamiyavuṭanevata veṇkuṭai niḻaṟṟa
ceṅkolocci vāḻi pallūḻi Āḻinaṭappa cempoṉ vira
siṅhāsanattu puvanamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭu viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirā
jakecaripanmarāṉa tribhuvaṉacakravarttikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḷa
devarkku yāṇṭu muṉṟāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭa
lattuk kaḷattūr koṭṭattu ceṅkuṉṟanāṭṭut tirukkaccūrāna nittavinotanallū
r Ūrom vuṭaiyār tiruvālakkoyiluṭaiyārkku Ivvūr kirantai
celvan cūriyatevaṉ vaitta tirunandā viḷakku Onṟukku Ikkoyilil
Ādidāsacaṇṭeśvaravilaiyāka Eṅkaḷūr vaṭakaḻaniyil melpārkkel
lai ceṅkaḻunir kkuṭṭattukku kiḻakkum tenpārkkellai pirāṭṭiceṟuvukku
vaṭakkum kiḻpārkkellai Erikiḻ ceṟuvil meṟkaṭaiya kuḻi Aimpatu
Erikkaraiyil Uṟṟuvarampukku meṟkku vaṭapārkkellai Erikka
ḻani kku teṟkkum Innānkellaikku naṭuvupaṭṭa nilam patinaṟu
cāṇkolāl Uttamanaṅkai kuḻi Aiynūṟum Ūnilamoḻivinṟi
viṟṟukkkuṭuttu koḷvatāka Emmilicain=ta vilaipporuḷanṟāṭu naṟ
kācu Aiñcum kaikkoṇṭu viṟṟukkuṭuttom Innilattāl van=tana
vilai An=tarāyam cilliṟai peruvari veṭṭi muṭṭayāḷkaḷ I
ṟaiyiḻicci nāṅkaḷe Iṟukka kaṭavomākavum Ittirunun=tā
viḷakku cantirātittavarai celvatāka cilālekai paṇṇi
Digital edition of SII 26.280 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
